rulings.Case Title: ROBERT COURTNIER VS. CERTAINTEED CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Harbison-Mahony-Higgins, Inc.'S Joinder To Defendant Luppen & Hawley'S Motion Seeking An Order Granting Relief From Mandatory Settlement Conference Requirements
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for October 13, 2016, Thursday, in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Harbison-Mahony-Higgins, Inc.'s joinder to Luppen and Hawley, Inc.'s motion for relief from Pang Ly's notice of MSC requirements is off calendar at the joining party's request. = (503/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT COURTNIER VS. CERTAINTEED CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Dap, Inc.'S Joinder To Luppen & Hawley'S Motion For Relief From Pang Ly'S Notice Of Mandatory Settlement Conference Requirements
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for October 13, 2016, Thursday, in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant DAP, Inc.'s joinder to Luppen and Hawley, Inc.'s motion for relief from Pang Ly's notice of MSC requirements is denied. Defendant must designate one carrier representative who possesses full and final settlement authority to be present at the October 18, 2016 Mandatory Settlement Conference. Confidential disclosures are due to the court by 4:00 p.m., October 13, 2016. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. = (503/GLW)
